name: Portgas.D.Ace - P-074 (Pirate Foil)
effect_text: [Activate:Main] You may return this Character to the owner's hand: Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck and place them as the top or bottom of the deck in any order.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with a different border (Note: the original print had a full art border).
